commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the Control UI chat session picker to keep loading through hidden subagent-only pages, hide misleading raw total counts when filtered rows are present, and adds regression coverage for that pagination path.

PR surface: Source +21, Tests +113. Total +134 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. this is source-reproducible: current main filters inactive subagent rows after loading raw paginated results, so a hidden-only page can leave the visible picker unchanged while the footer uses the raw total. I did not run a live Control UI reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human handling is needed because the PR has the protected `maintainer` label and the external real-behavior proof gate is not satisfied; there is no narrow code defect for an automated repair.

target.title: fix(web-ui): skip hidden subagent picker pages
target.body:
Fixes #89249.

Summary:
- Advance the chat session picker through raw `sessions.list` pages that add no visible rows after hidden spawn-child subagent filtering.
- Stop showing raw total counts when the picker is filtering out loaded rows, avoiding misleading states like `1 / 177`.
- Add regression coverage for a hidden-only page followed by a visible session page.

Surface area:
- No public config schema/options changes.
- No plugin API/contract changes.
- No new CLI flags, env vars, migrations, or setup surface.

Validation:
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts -t "chat session picker" --reporter=dot` -> 1 file, 6 passed, 79 skipped.
- `node_modules/oxfmt/bin/oxfmt --check ui/src/ui/chat/session-controls.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts` -> passed.
- `node_modules/oxlint/bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.json ui/src/ui/chat/session-controls.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts` -> 0 warnings/errors.
- `git diff --check -- ui/src/ui/chat/session-controls.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts` -> passed.
- `OPENCLAW_UI_E2E_ALLOW_MISSING_CHROMIUM=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/e2e/chat-picker-pagination.e2e.test.ts --reporter=dot` -> shard passed; test skipped because Chromium is missing in this environment.
- Codex review against `origin/main` -> no actionable correctness issues.

Behavior proof:
- The new unit coverage starts with one visible direct session plus one hidden spawn-child row.
- Clicking Load More first receives an all-hidden spawn-child page at offset `2`, then automatically requests offset `4`.
- The picker ends with visible labels `Main chat` and `Main work`, count `2`, and no dead-end Load More button.
